hero.escape-fortuna: Your Costa Rican escape in La Fortuna
hero.hero-text: Minutes from Arenal Volcano, our Airbnb blends modern comfort with Costa Rican beauty.
hero.hero-sub: Immerse yourself in nature, unwind in a peaceful setting, and explore the very best of La Fortuna.

book.book: Book your escape to La Fortuna now.

whatweoffer.about: Nestled in a privileged natural setting, our villa offers two fully equipped units that can be rented independently or as a single interconnected complex for a max of 10 people, providing flexibility and privacy according to your needs.  Each unit features a fully equipped kitchen, ideal for preparing your favorite dishes, as well as a jacuzzi designed for absolute relaxation.
whatweoffer.about-2: Enjoy a charming front porch and back porch, perfect for admiring the surrounding nature. From every corner of the property, you can delight in the impressive and majestic views of the Arenal Volcano. Easily reserve a villa or the entire complex through WhatsApp and enjoy a truly unique and unforgettable lodging experience.
whatweoffer.volcano-views-desc: Wake up to stunning views of Arenal Volcano from your window every morning.
whatweoffer.modern-comfort-desc: Enjoy AC, wifi, and comfortable beds in a natural, peaceful setting.
whatweoffer.adv-door-desc: Easy access to hot springs, hiking trails, and rainforest adventures.

faq.question1: How close are you to Arenal Volcano?
faq.answer1: We are just a 10-minute drive from the entrance to Arenal Volcano National Park and less than 5 minutes from downtown La Fortuna. You’ll enjoy stunning views of the volcano right from the property!
faq.answer2: Yes, we offer free private parking on-site for all guests. The area is secure and easily accessible for all vehicle types.
faq.question3: Are local tours and activities available?
faq.answer3: Absolutely! We can help you book popular activities like hot springs, ziplining, waterfall hikes, volcano tours, and more. Ask us for recommendations — we love helping guests plan their adventures!

info.wa-text: Hi! I’d love to book a stay in La Fortuna. Could you please share availability and details?

seo.homeTitle: Luxury Villas near Arenal Volcano, Costa Rica
seo.homeDescription: Experience a private luxury villa escape with stunning Arenal Volcano views. Our deluxe hotel is your perfect base for adventure in La Fortuna. Book your stay today!
seo.keywords: Arenal Costa Rica villas, hotel near Arenal Volcano, luxury villas La Fortuna, deluxe accommodation Costa Rica, nature retreat Arenal, private villas with volcano view, Arenal Volcanic Villas

seo.galleryDescription: Explore our photo gallery to see stunning images of our luxury villas, the breathtaking Arenal Volcano, lush gardens, and inviting pool.

gallery.text: See every detail of our villa and its breathtaking surroundings.
gallery.subtext: From sparkling pools to terrace sunsets, let each image inspire your next stay.
gallery.title: Stunning Villa Views.

terms-and-conditions.pageDescription: Read our house rules and return policy to ensure a pleasant stay.
terms-and-conditions.title: Terms & Return Policy
terms-and-conditions.intro: Welcome to Arenal Volcanic Villas! We’re delighted to host you and hope your stay is both comfortable and relaxing. To ensure a smooth and enjoyable experience for everyone, we kindly ask that you follow a few important guidelines during your stay.
terms-and-conditions.cancellationText: Reservations can be cancelled free of charge up to 14 days before check-in. If cancelled between 7 and 14 days prior to arrival, 50% of the total will be retained. No refund will be granted if the cancellation is made less than 7 days in advance or in case of a no-show.
terms-and-conditions.rule1: No smoking: Smoking is not allowed inside the units or in common areas. An additional $200 fine will apply for non-compliance.
terms-and-conditions.rule2: Check-in: From 3 p.m. If you arrive after 8 p.m., please coordinate in advance.
terms-and-conditions.rule3: Check-out: Until 12 p.m. An additional charge will be applied for late departures.
terms-and-conditions.rule4: Maximum capacity: The number of guests indicated for each unit must not be exceeded.
terms-and-conditions.rule5: Noise respect: Maintain a quiet environment between 10 p.m. and 8 a.m.
terms-and-conditions.rule6: Responsibility for damages: The guest is responsible for any damage or loss during their stay.
terms-and-conditions.rule7: Pets: No pets allowed unless previously agreed. If authorized, an additional cost of $40 per night per pet will apply.
terms-and-conditions.rule8: Security: Close doors and windows when leaving. The complex is not responsible for personal items.
terms-and-conditions.rule9: Use of common areas: Leave common areas clean and in good condition.
terms-and-conditions.rule10: Safety: Do not share personal information and contact reception in case of any emergency.
terms-and-conditions.rule11: Rates: The base price of all rates is for 2 people. From the third person onwards, an additional charge calculated by the system will apply. Rates are dynamic and vary according to availability and demand, so they may change at any time.
terms-and-conditions.closing: Thank you for choosing Arenal Volcanic Villas. By staying with us, you agree to these policies, and we truly appreciate your cooperation in helping us maintain a safe, comfortable, and enjoyable environment. We hope you enjoy your stay and make the most of everything our beautiful location has to offer!
terms-and-conditions.imageAlt1: Aerial view of the property taken by drone
